product_overview: Educakids is a web app for early childhood educators that streamlines classroom management, weekly lesson planning, and AI-assisted activity generation. It also provides a teacher dashboard to review daily priorities, student status, and schedule overviews in one place.
core_goals: Review the day’s classroom status and teaching priorities from a central dashboard
Create and manage weekly lesson plans aligned to the classroom theme
Generate customized educational activity sheets with AI
Track student attendance and daily behavioral reactions
Add, edit, and maintain student profiles for classroom management

features.name: Painel Principal do Professor (Dashboard)
features.description: Provides a daily snapshot of the class, upcoming activity, weekly agenda summary, and today’s focus items.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the daily greeting and date -> Review the class summary and mood overview -> Open the current day activity in Modo Aula -> Add a focus item for today -> Mark a focus item as completed

features.name: Gerador de Atividades com IA
features.description: Lets the teacher configure parameters and generate a personalized pedagogical activity sheet using AI.
user_flows: Navigate to /activities -> Select an age group -> Enter a theme -> Choose a cognitive difficulty -> Mark one or more activity types -> Generate with AI -> Review the generated activity sheet -> Print the activity sheet with illustrations

Navigate to /activities -> Import a planned activity from a saved weekly plan -> Review the auto-filled theme and activity type -> Edit any parameters manually -> Generate with AI -> Review the generated activity sheet

features.name: Planejador Semanal Integrado
features.description: Supports weekly lesson planning with calendar-based week selection, manual editing, AI-assisted plan creation, and saving.
user_flows: Navigate to /planner -> Select a week from the calendar -> Create a new planning in blank mode -> Edit daily objectives and focus items -> Save the planning
Navigate to /planner -> Select a week from the calendar -> Create a new planning with AI -> Review the suggested weekly structure -> Edit daily objectives and focus items -> Save the planning
Navigate to /planner -> Select a saved day or activity in the weekly view -> Open the linked activity generation flow -> Continue with prefilled theme and activity type

features.name: Gestão de Alunos (Sala de Aula)
features.description: Allows the teacher to manage attendance, record student behavior, and maintain student profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /classroom -> Review the student list -> Mark each student as present or absent -> Register a daily behavior reaction for a student -> Confirm the classroom status
Navigate to /classroom -> Add a new student profile -> Enter the student details -> Save the profile -> Edit an existing student profile -> Update the student details -> Save the changes

routes.description: Dashboard inicial com agenda, humor da turma, presença e focos do dia.
Gerador de atividades pedagógicas lúdicas personalizadas com inteligência artificial.
Planejamento semanal e calendário com sugestões pedagógicas e feriados nacionais.
Painel de gerenciamento de alunos, chamada de presença e registros de comportamento.

features.name: Painel Principal do Professor (Dashboard)
features.description: Exibe resumo de chamada, clima/humor da turma, próxima atividade planejada, agenda semanal resumida e focos do dia.
user_interactions: Visualizar a data e a saudação personalizada
Iniciar ou concluir a atividade do dia (ativar o Modo Aula)
Adicionar e marcar como concluídos os itens de Foco de Hoje

features.name: Gerador de Atividades com IA
features.description: Cria atividades práticas com parâmetros configuráveis pela professora (faixa etária, tema, tipo e dificuldade) via API do Gemini.
user_interactions: Digitar o Tema no campo de texto
Visualizar e imprimir a folha com ilustrações geradas

features.name: Planejador Semanal Integrado
features.description: Agenda semanal com focos diários, objetivos pedagógicos alinhados com a BNCC e sugestões de dicas de ouro dinâmicas baseadas no tema.
user_interactions: Selecionar a semana clicando nos dias do calendário
Clicar em "Criar Planejamento" e escolher gerar com IA ou criar em branco
Editar diretamente os objetivos e os focos de cada dia
Clicar em "Salvar" para gravar no banco de dados local/nuvem

features.name: Gestão de Alunos (Sala de Aula)
features.description: Controle de presença diário e acompanhamento comportamental dos alunos.
user_interactions: Fazer a chamada dos alunos (Presente ou Ausente)
Adicionar e editar perfis de alunos com fotos ou etiquetas
